Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix pivoting-agent lint: put search_skills/list_skills on same line as "do not"

The lint test checks per-line for search_skills()/list_skills() references
and only exempts lines containing "do not" or "never call". The prohibition
was split across two lines, so the line with the function names didn't match.

commit.message:
音声認識モデル選択（クラウド/ローカル）機能追加・秘密機能開放パスワード実装・バージョン更新

- Web Speech APIのクラウド/ローカル（オンデバイス）認識をラジオボタンで切り替え可能に
- 秘密機能パスワードで音声認識モデル選択・優先音声認識UIの表示/非表示を制御
- パスワードはXOR難読化で保持、一度開放したら永続化（リセット用パスワードも用意）
- ローカルモデル選択時のみ優先音声認識（contextual biasing）設定を表示
- i18n対応（日英）、プリセット保存/復元対応
- betaファイル削除、バージョンを2026.03.05に更新

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restore clean refresh (no freeze), server-side search for broader results

- Refresh on #results now redirects to #main cleanly (prevents freeze
  caused by trying to restore results before API data loads)
- performSearch() now queries Trestle API server-side when local results
  are sparse, merging additional listings into results
- Server search builds OData params from criteria (type, address, price,
  beds, baths, neighborhood)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: sticky header reste visible au scroll + alignement formulaire client

- Sticky sidebar utilise var(--header-h) pour se positionner sous le header
- JS mesure dynamiquement la hauteur du header au login et au resize
- Parcelle/Tel/Email sur 3 colonnes (plus de trou)
- Dept/Surface/RFR/Foyer/Annee sur 5 colonnes (annee integree)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 3: Agora public board, Whisper encrypted 1:1, context-driven engagement

Adds two communication layers on top of BLE encounters:

- Agora: public broadcast board with ring buffer, signed posts, quarantine
- Whisper: private ECDH P-256 + AES-256-GCM encrypted sessions (up to 3 concurrent)
- BLE fragmentation layer for messages exceeding MTU
- Real content quarantine with prompt injection detection
- Scanner connection hooks: read remote agora boards during same BLE connection
- Whisper initiation coordinator: watches dwell time, gathers agora context,
  asks agent to start private conversations that create value for humans
- Rich agent prompts with full peer context (distance, dwell, agora posts)
- Settings v3 with agora/whisper config, auto-migration from v2
- UI: three-tab layout (Nearby/Agora/Whisper), live post feed, chat bubbles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: inline all CSS + fix forced reflow in nav scroll handler

- Set build.inlineStylesheets: 'always' — eliminates render-blocking CSS
  network requests (/_astro/index.css + page CSS), saves ~380ms on critical path
- Pre-cache section offsetTop values on load/resize in Nav scroll listener;
  RAF callback now only reads scrollY (no layout queries after style mutations)
- Add { passive: true } to scroll/resize event listeners

fix: bookings page now checks session tables + unified_context

The bookings API was only querying all_leads.booking_date which was
NULL for existing bookings. Now checks all sources (direct columns,
unified_context per channel, session tables) matching the same logic
as founder-metrics getBookingData(). Also auto-backfills the direct
columns so future queries are fast.

commit.message:
feat: Router LLMによるGrounding + Function Callingの動的切り替え (#99)

* feat: Router LLMによるGrounding + Function Callingの動的切り替え (#94)

ユーザーの入力意図を軽量LLMで事前判定し、google_search（grounding）と
function_declarations（XIVAPI等）を動的に切り替える仕組みを実装。
ENABLE_GOOGLE_SEARCH_GROUNDING環境変数を廃止し、設定不要でシームレスに
両機能を利用できるようになった。

- ai/router.py: Router LLM実装（プリフィルタ・JSON mode・フォールバック）
- ai/api.py: call_genai_with_tools に tool_mode 引数を追加
- ai/conversation.py: input_message 内で detect_tool_mode を呼び出し
- config.py: ENABLE_GOOGLE_SEARCH_GROUNDING 廃止、ROUTER_ENABLED/ROUTER_MODEL 追加
- tests/test_ai/test_router.py: Router LLM のテスト20件を新規追加
- .env.sample, README.md: 環境変数ドキュメントを更新

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: コードレビュー指摘対応 (router.py)

- _PREFILT_MAX_CHARS を 10 → 7 に変更（短い日本語クエリの漏れ対策）
- type: ignore[assignment] を cast(ToolMode, ...) に置換
- test_grounding_mode_detection の冗長なモックを除去し他テストと構造を統一

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: TOOL_USAGE_INSTRUCTIONを強化してFF14データ検索でツールを必ず使うよう明示

学習データに頼らず必ずツールを呼ぶよう指示を変更し、
gemini-2.5-proが訓練データから直答してfunction callingをスキップする問題を修正。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: _get_genai_clientのシングルトン初期化をスレッドセーフにする

RouterとメインAPIが並行してclientを初期化しようとした際の
TOCTOU競合状態をdouble-checked lockingで修正。

commit.message:
refactor: use ReservationSnapshot record and fetchSnapshot() in lifecycle test (#38)

Replace three separate JDBC queries per test with a single JOIN query
wrapped in a private fetchSnapshot() helper returning a ReservationSnapshot
record. Both test methods now share the helper, reducing duplication and
making assertions clearer.

feat(crid): implement ImageService methods on Server

from pkg/cri/docker to pkg/crid/docker/server.go with cleanup:

- ImageFsInfo reuses ListImages and fetches DockerRootDir from system info
- ListImages inlines trivial dockerImageToRuntimeImage conversion
- RemoveImage swallows not-found errors per CRI spec

commit.message:
fix: align catalog name avatars vertically on overview page

The catalog name buttons had padding: "0 0 9px" which made them 9px
taller than their text. With alignItems: "center" on the inner wrapper,
avatars were centered against the padded button height rather than the
text, placing them ~4.5px below text center.

Remove bottom padding from both catalog name buttons (rename trigger and
collapse toggle) inside the inner name+avatar wrapper. The outer row uses
alignItems: baseline so no equal-height requirement exists there.
Result matches the detail page: avatars centered exactly against text.

manual page refresh (F5/Cmd+R). We now set history.scrollRestoration =
'manual' so only our own cache-based restoration runs on back-navigation.

commit.message:
Fix 097.054/025/002/118/105: restore EAR, legacy classification, MDD certs

- 097.054: Restore EAR contact for non-EU manufacturers (was incorrectly
  removed; EAR IS valid alongside EMA, just not as sole Actor type)
- 097.025: Add MODEL_NUMBER to additionalTradeItemIdentification for legacy
  devices since globalModelInformation is stripped
- 097.002: Legacy devices (MDD/AIMDD/IVDD) use classification system 85,
  not 76 (same risk class codes, different system)
- 097.105: Map MDD legacy certificates (ii-4, ii-excluding-4, iii, iv, v, vi)
  to GS1 CertificationStandard codes (MDD_II_4, MDD_II_EX_4, etc.)
- 097.118: Skip GS1 direct marking DI if not exactly 14 digits

docs: file-based planning workflow 템플릿 적용 — 6-file 구조 재정리

ahastudio/file-based-planning-workflow 템플릿에 맞춰 specs/ 문서 전면 재구성:
- README.md 신규 생성 (프로젝트 개요 + Related Documents 링크)
- SPEC.md → spec.md rename + 도메인 모델 분리 (plan.md로 이동)
- plan.md 전면 재작성 (Architecture, Critical Files, Domain Model, Verification)
- tasks.md Phase 기반 체크박스 형식으로 전환
- findings.md 상세 Issues/Learnings 포맷 적용
- progress.md Error Log 테이블 + Phase별 기록 구조화
- CLAUDE.md 6-file 구조 반영

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(shell): make AI response language follow locale setting

UI locale change (e.g. English) was not reflected in AI responses because
buildSystemPrompt() never referenced locale. DEFAULT_PERSONA hardcoded
"Speaks naturally in Korean" and buildMemoryContext() skipped locale,
speechStyle, and honorific fields entirely.

- Neutralize DEFAULT_PERSONA language ("user's preferred language")
- Add locale field to MemoryContext, inject "Respond in {Language}" instruction
- Make speechStyle/honorific Korean-only (guard + UI conditional)
- Add locale-specific emotion examples for all 14 supported locales
- Fix buildMemoryContext() missing locale/speechStyle/honorific
- Propagate locale to all buildSystemPrompt + syncToOpenClaw call sites
- Add i18n context docs (triple-mirror: .agents + .users + .users/ko)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
